description: Babel preset for Gravity UI projects, bundling env, TypeScript, React, and runtime transform plugins with sensible defaults. Behavior varies by NODE_ENV/BABEL_ENV: development and production use @babel/preset-env for browser targets while test targets current Node; @babel/plugin-proposal-decorators is added when TypeScript is enabled; babel-plugin-transform-react-remove-prop-types (removeImport) is added in production only; babel-plugin-dynamic-import-node is added in test only.
